info.title: FormaOS API
info.description:
FormaOS is a compliance management platform. This API provides programmatic access to organizations, tasks, evidence, compliance metrics, controls, members, webhooks, integrations, API keys, frameworks, AI chat, reports, notifications, data residency, SOC 2, certificates, and audit logs.

All API keys use the `fos_` prefix. Include the key as a Bearer token in the Authorization header.

get.description: Returns the authenticated organization's details along with aggregate stats (member count, framework count, active API key count).
Returns tasks assigned to the authenticated user, with optional filters by status and priority.
Returns evidence artifacts for the organization, with optional filters by verification status and associated task.
Returns the organization's compliance score, risk level, task completion rates, evidence collection rates, and anomalies.
Returns paginated compliance controls with evidence status and evaluation data. Supports filtering by framework and text search.
Returns a single compliance control with linked evidence, evaluation data, and full evidence records.
Returns paginated organization members and pending invitations. Supports filtering by role and status.

200.description: Paginated list of members and invitations

post.description: Sends an invitation email to a new team member. Requires admin access and `members:write` scope.

get.description: Returns a single member or invitation by ID.

patch.description: Updates the role of a member or invitation. Requires admin access and `members:write` scope.

delete.description: Removes a member from the organization or revokes a pending invitation. Requires admin access and `members:write` scope.

get.description: Returns registered webhooks for the organization. Secrets are masked in responses.

post.description: Registers a new webhook URL with event subscriptions. The signing secret is returned only on creation -- store it securely.

get.description: Returns a single webhook's configuration. Optionally includes recent delivery history.

patch.description: Updates webhook configuration (name, URL, events, enabled status, etc.). Only provided fields are updated.

delete.description: Permanently removes a webhook and its delivery history.

post.description: Queues a test delivery to the specified webhook to verify connectivity.

webhookId.description: ID of the webhook to test

get.description: Returns paginated webhook delivery logs with optional filters by event type, status, and webhook ID.
Performs a cross-entity search across tasks, evidence, controls, and members. Returns up to 10 results per entity type.

200.description: Search results grouped by entity type

get.description: Returns the integration catalog, connected integrations, and their status. Use the `view` query parameter to filter.

post.description: Connects a new integration or tests an existing connection. Set `action` to `test` to verify connectivity without modifying state, or `connect` (default) to establish the integration.

parameters.name: integrationId
parameters.description: Integration type identifier (e.g., slack, jira, github)

delete.description: Disconnects a connected integration. Requires admin access.

get.description: Returns recent event history for a specific integration.
Returns all API keys for the organization (active and revoked). Requires admin access.

post.description: Creates a new API key. The plaintext key (prefixed with `fos_`) is returned only once -- store it securely. Requires admin access.

patch.summary: Update or rotate an API key
patch.description: Updates an API key's name, scopes, or rate limit. Set `rotate: true` to generate a new key value while preserving the key ID. Requires admin access.

rotate.description: Set to true to rotate the key (generates new plaintext key)

200.description: API key updated (includes new plaintext key if rotated)

delete.description: Permanently revokes an API key. The key cannot be used after revocation. Requires admin access.

get.description: Returns paginated compliance frameworks enabled for the organization, including coverage and evaluation data.

200.description: Paginated list of frameworks with coverage data

post.description: Sends a message to the AI compliance assistant and receives a streaming text response. The response includes a `X-Conversation-Id` header. Optionally provide a `conversationId` to continue an existing conversation, or a `templateId` to use a prompt template.

message.description: User message to send to the AI assistant

get.description: Returns paginated conversations for the authenticated user, most recent first.

post.description: Creates a new AI conversation with an optional title.

get.description: Returns a conversation and its messages (paginated, chronological order).

patch.description: Updates a conversation's title or archive status.

archived.description: Set true to archive, false to unarchive

delete.description: Permanently deletes a conversation and all its messages.

get.description: Returns paginated report export jobs for the organization.

post.description: Queues a new report generation job. Requires admin access and `reports:write` scope.

get.description: Returns report metadata. Pass `download=true` to redirect to the report file URL.

parameters.name: download
parameters.description: Set to true or 1 to redirect to the file URL

302.description: Redirect to report file URL (when download=true)

get.description: Returns paginated notifications for the authenticated user. Supports filtering for unread only.

parameters.name: unread
parameters.description: If true, return only unread notifications

patch.description: Marks specific notifications (by ID array) or all notifications as read.

ids.description: Notification IDs to mark as read

all.description: Set to true to mark all notifications as read

get.description: Returns the organization's current data residency region and all available regions.

patch.description: Changes the organization's data residency region. Requires admin role.

get.description: Returns the latest SOC 2 readiness score, domain breakdown, and control results.
Returns the latest SOC 2 certification report data including assessment scores, milestones, and score history. Requires GENERATE_CERTIFICATIONS permission.

post.description: Triggers generation of a new SOC 2 certification report. Requires GENERATE_CERTIFICATIONS permission.

get.description: Returns paginated organization certifications with computed expiry status (active, expiring, expired). Supports filtering by status.
Returns audit log entries for the organization with optional filters by action and date range.

apiKeyAuth.description: FormaOS API key with `fos_` prefix. Pass as `Authorization: Bearer fos_...`

Limit.name: limit
Limit.description: Maximum number of results per page (max 100)

Offset.name: offset
Offset.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

Unauthorized.description: Authentication required -- missing or invalid Bearer token

url.description: Must be HTTPS (or localhost for development)

headers.description: Custom HTTP headers sent with each delivery

prefix.description: First characters of the key for identification (e.g. fos_abc...)
